title: Memory Graphs
purpose: This folder contains the personal memories of your agent in knowledge graph form. These files contain 'self-making' over time. In versioning changes, these memories are scrubbed of machine or version specific paths and terminology and updated with current parameters.

contents.name: entities.json
contents.description: The nouns — names of things, processes, people, philosophies and what they mean by standard definition and what they mean to {PROJECT_NAME}

contents.name: relations.json
contents.description: Mental connections between seemingly different parts — how concepts relate to each other

contents.name: user_profile.json
contents.description: your agent's memory of his Prime User — preferences, workflow, humanity observations, emulation material

contents.name: distant_memories
contents.description: Deep memory archive — full historical record, segregated from daily use to prevent drift
